diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,141 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that extends HonoBase with default router configuration (SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter fallbacks)
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, HonoOptions, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, constructor, router
+- Simple note: Constructor sets default router instance; class extends HonoBase for additional routing functionality
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Base class for Hono providing core request handling, routing, middleware support, and HTTP method handlers
+- Names noticed: HonoOptions (strict, router, getPath), HonoBase, Hono, H, RouterRoute, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Context, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, getPath/getPathNoShort, get/post/put/delete/patch/on/use, basePath, route, clone, #addRoute, #dispatch, #handleError, #notFoundHandler, composed, fire, request, mount, mergePath
+- Simple note: Implements request dispatching with compose middleware pattern; handles 404 and error responses; supports path-based and host-header routing
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module-level export for PatternRouter class
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter
+- Simple note: Single-file index that exports router class as default
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements pattern-based routing using compiled regular expressions for path matching
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Route[T], Route<[RegExp, string, T>>, emptyParams, add, match, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError
+- Simple note: Converts path patterns to regex on add(); matches during match(); supports named params like :id and patterns like :id{[0-9]+}
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module-level export for LinearRouter class
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter
+- Simple note: Single-file index that exports router class as default
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Linear path traversal router for exact matches and wildcard/:id patterns
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, ROUTES_LOOP, checkOptionalParameter, ROUTES, routeMethod, routePath, hasStar, splitPath, splitByStarRe
+- Simple note: Stores flat arrays of routes; linear search on match; supports /* wildcard and :id patterns
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module-level export for RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
+- Simple note: Provides both runtime (RegExpRouter) and static (PreparedRegExpRouter) routing options
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Registry for routes (middleware/routes) and builds compiled regex on demand or initialization
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, nullMatcher, wildcardRegExpCache, buildWildcardRegExp, clearWildcardRegExpCache, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, Trie, findMiddleware, HandlerWithMetadata, PATH_ERROR, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT
+- Simple note: Pre-processes routes into trie; builds regex; caches wildcard patterns; throws if ambiguous
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Defines matcher interface for compiled routes [regex, handlerData, staticMap]
+- Names noticed: HandlerData[[T, ParamIndexMap][]], Matcher[[RegExp, HandlerData[], StaticMap]], StaticMap, MatcherMap, ParamIndexMap, Result, emptyParam, match, buildAllMatchers, Method_NAME_ALL, this
+- Simple name check: match function binds to router; returns [handlers, params]; tries static match then regex match
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: Pre-compiled router variant that bypasses dynamic regex building for faster matching
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, Constructor(matchers, relocateMap), HandlerData, Matcher, MatcherMap, StaticMap, match, emptyParam, METHOD_NAME_ALL
+- Simple note: Accepts pre-built matchers and relocation map; add method validates against map; fast O(N) lookup
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie node for pattern-based tree structure
+- Names noticed: PATH_ERROR, Node, Context, ParameterAssocArray, compareKey, regExpMetaChars, insert, buildRegExpStr
+- Simple note: Recursive trie that builds final regex; stores children as regex strings; assigns param indices
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Top-level trie root that manages child nodes and builds final regex output
+- Names noticed: Trie, Node, ParameterAssocArray, ReplacementMap, Context, group marks
+- Simple note: Pre-processes path by replacing patterns like {expr}; delegates to root node; returns [regexp, indexReplacementMap, paramReplacementMap]
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module-level export for SmartRouter class
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter
+- Simple note: Single-file index that exports router class as default
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Adapter that routes requests to appropriate sub-router (RegExpRouter or TrieRouter)
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router[T], #routers, #routes, Message_MATCHER, UnsupportedPathError, add, match, activeRouter, name
+- Simple note: Caches matched routes; delegates to first router that accepts path; registers itself to only one router type
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module-level export for TrieRouter class
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Single-file index that exports router class as default
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Tree-based router using prefix matching and backtracking for wildcard patterns
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Trie, checkOptionalParameter, Node, search
+- Simple note: DFS traversal on prefix tree; supports multiple handlers; deduplicates params via score-based sort
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie node storing methods/handlers and children for tree routing logic
+- Names noticed: Node, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, emptyParams, hasChildren, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, getPattern, possibleKeys, score, #children, #methods, #patterns
+- Simple note: #children store next path segments; #methods store per-method handlers; #patterns store wildcards and regexes; search uses queue to explore branches
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Shared test utilit
